name: Dacome International Ltd.
summary: Dacome International Ltd. distributes golf brands in Taiwan, the United States, and Japan. The company offers balls, golf products, footwear, bags, apparel, hats, belts, gloves, accessories, audiovisual books, team gifts, and gift certificates, as well as training supplies. It also markets its products through its Website, golfshop.com.tw; and provides golf equipment bidding, golf courses booking, golf tours at home and abroad, golf skills teaching, handicap system, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
